creator: dereks@lifeofadishwasher.com
text: Looks like 0026-vfs-add-a-compatibility-option-to-the-vfs_streams_xa.patch has some issues.  It's inserting what appears to be git rebase/merge conflict lines?  I'm guessing you don't want to include that at all?  streams_xattr_fcntl exists and is the same as the patch?
